ddls:
CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "xmin" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the starting point of the annotated text */,
  "ymin" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the starting point of the annotated text */,
  "xmax" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the ending point of the annotated text */,
  "ymax" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the ending point of the annotated text */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the annotated segment */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label assigned to the annotated text */,
  "special_char_count" INTEGER /* Count of special characters in the annotated text */,
  "is_float" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotated text contains floating-point numbers */,
  "is_date" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotated text contains dates */,
  "total_distinct_numbers" INTEGER /* Total count of distinct numbers in the annotated text */,
  "big_num_length" INTEGER /* Length of the largest number in the annotated text */,
  "contains_number" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotated text contains any numbers */,
  "pos_tag_distribution_sym" TEXT /* Distribution of symbolic POS tags in the annotated text */,
  "pos_tag_distribution_num" TEXT /* Distribution of numeric POS tags in the annotated text */,
  "pos_tag_distribution_cc" TEXT /* Distribution of coordinating conjunction POS tags in the annotated text */,
  "pos_tag_distribution_propn" TEXT /* Distribution of proper noun POS tags in the annotated text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the annotation was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the annotation */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the annotation (scale: 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label (e.g., company, address) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the label */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color assigned to the label (e.g., #FF0000) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., annotator, reviewer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the annotation */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was reviewed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "review_comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_reviews_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in the annotation history */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the annotation */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_history_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, Word document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_annotations" (
  "assoc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between a document and an annotation */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document containing the annotated text */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotated text segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assoc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_annotations_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_annotations_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "assoc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between a project and a document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assoc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "assoc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between a project and a user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assoc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_annotations" (
  "assoc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between a report and an annotation */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotated text segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assoc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_annotations_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_annotations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_users" (
  "assoc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between a report and a user */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assoc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_users_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
